name: Open WebUI
description: Self-hosted AI platform with OpenAI-compatible REST API, MCP support, and a pipelines SDK. Supports Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, vLLM. pip install open-webui.

skills.name: OpenAI-Compatible API
skills.description: Expose any local or cloud model through an OpenAI-compatible REST API for drop-in agent integration.

skills.name: Model Management
skills.description: Manage, switch, and configure multiple AI models from one platform with user-level access control.

skills.name: Pipeline SDK
skills.description: Build custom processing pipelines — filters, actions, manifolds — deployed as OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
